pi_items.source: setup_task.sh creates file at this exact path during task initialization
export_result.sh checks for output file at this exact path
Task description specifies 4 columns: Time, Main Stage, Track A, Track B. Verifier checks for col_count == 4.

Task description states: 'ensure that events marked (ALL ATTENDEES)...span across the three venue columns'. Source data in setup_task.sh contains 7 events marked (ALL ATTENDEES), not 3. Metadata lists only 3 but all 7 have the (ALL ATTENDEES) marker and should be merged per task requirements.
Task description specifies: 'Set page orientation to Landscape'. Verifier checks for page_width > page_height.

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a synthetic conference schedule document in LibreOffice Writer. Source data is generated during setup containing 9 event rows across a 10-row schedule (including header). The document requires 4 columns, landscape orientation with 0.5-inch margins. Critically, the metadata claims only 3 events (Opening Keynote, Networking Lunch, Closing Keynote) should have merged cells, but the task description and actual source data indicate all 7 events marked '(ALL ATTENDEES)' should be merged: Registration & Breakfast, Opening Keynote, Coffee Break, Networking Lunch, Afternoon Tea, Closing Keynote, and Networking Mixer.
